title: Best of George Readers' Choice Awards
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards is back! We were blown away by the community’s engagement with the 2023 Best of George project and we’re thrilled to announce that voting has now opened for the 2024 Best of George Reader’s Choice Awards.


> This project aims to celebrate the very best of our region, from shopping and outdoor activities, to restaurants and professional services.


More than 17 850 nominations for over 1 500 businesses were received, and a 2024 winner will be crowned in each of the 151 categories.

Your nominations and keen participation clearly show that our community is all about celebrating excellence. So, let’s get voting and put the very best of George in the spotlight

Congratulations to each 2024 nominee!

Voting is now open at www.bestofgeorge.com.

Each vote rewards a company for going the extra mile and upholding the good name of our unique town, so please be honest in your assessment and ensure that a worthy winner emerges in each category.

Voting closes 25 July 2024.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
